source: US Census Bureau, Business Trends and Outlook Survey (BTOS) — share of firms using AI to produce goods or services
note: Live from the Census BTOS National.xlsx (share of firms using AI in ANY business function). Broader than the older 'producing goods/services' supplement. Parsed with deterministic invariants.
question: In the last two weeks, did this business use Artificial Intelligence (AI) in any of its business functions? — Yes
